title: A4.1 rep1
treatment_protocol_ch1: Small pieces of the mid-ileum were dissected, placed into 1 mL of RNAlater (Ambion Inc.), stored overnight at 4 °C, and transferred to -80 °C until transcriptomics analysis
extract_protocol_ch1: Approximately 30 mg of tissue were disrupted via a bead-beating step, and total RNA was extracted and purified with the RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Construction of RNA sequencing libraries was done with the TruSeq Stranded Total RNA Illumina kit including Ribo-Zero Gold
data_processing: Adapter removal and trimming was performed using Trimmomatic V0.36.
data_processing.1: STAR-aligner v020201 was used for alignment to the chicken genomes
data_processing.2: Samtools v1.7 were used to sort the BAM files by the read names.
data_processing.3: Aligned reads were counted with HTSeq-count v0.6.1.
data_processing.4: DESeq2 was used to evaluate differentially expressed genes.
